scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch{}; if(!String(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'').includes('pnpm')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
